title: Environment
explanation:
Environment

  • nature: forest, river, ocean, pollution, climate
  • problems: recycle, waste, plastic, energy, carbon
  • actions: protect, save, reduce, reuse

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: We should ____ paper and glass. | *recycle | pollute | waste
____ is a big problem in big cities. | *Pollution | Forest | River
Please don't leave ____ in the park. | *rubbish | climate | energy
We need to ____ water and electricity. | *save | reduce | plastic

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Many animals live in the ____. | forest
We should ____ the amount of plastic we use. | reduce

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The ____ is getting warmer. | *planet | rubbish | recycle
Turn off lights to save ____. | *energy | ocean | climate
